zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期偏多震荡上行
zh.content:
以太坊当前价格位于 $2365.34$ 附近，较昨日上涨 $0.87\%$，显示短期多头仍保持一定力量。价格在 $2343.19$ 的低点获得支撑，而 $2376.47$ 高点形成近期阻力区，整体呈现震荡上行格局。短线投资者需关注价格能否稳住 $2360$ 附近支撑。  

MACD 当前值为 $46.97805$，虽然信号线数据缺失，但指标数值仍偏向多头，有利于价格延续上行趋势。20日均线 $2280.75$ 显示中期均线支撑稳固，若价格回调至均线附近，可视为中性偏多买入机会，短线压力仍集中在近期高点附近。  

支撑位方面，重点关注 $2345$ 和 $2320$ 两个关键区域，一旦跌破可能引发进一步回调；阻力位则位于 $2375$ 与 $2400$ 附近，突破后或触发短期加速上涨。结合均线和价格走势，当前行情适合逢低布局，但需控制仓位，防范高位震荡。  

交易策略上，短线操作可考虑在支撑位附近轻仓买入，止损设置在 $2340$ 下方；中期投资者可关注均线支撑的承接力度，逢低增仓，同时在 $2375$-$2400$ 区间逐步减仓锁利。整体来看，以太坊短期偏多，震荡上行仍是主基调。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum has recently demonstrated a steady uptrend, with the current price of $2365.34 reflecting a 0.87% increase in the last 24 hours. Despite the modest price movement, the overall trend shows resilience above the $2300 support level, suggesting bullish sentiment in the near term. However, ETH/USD has encountered some resistance near the $2376 mark, which could be a critical barrier to further upward momentum. A break above this level could signal the continuation of the bullish trend towards higher targets.

The current MACD value of 46.97805 indicates positive momentum, but the lack of a defined signal line makes it difficult to assess whether the momentum is accelerating or slowing down. Without the signal line for a clearer interpretation, traders should proceed cautiously. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) remains unavailable, which limits the ability to gauge potential overbought or oversold conditions. A full assessment of market strength would benefit from the inclusion of RSI for a clearer picture of price dynamics.

In terms of moving averages, the 20-period SMA at $2280.75 serves as a potential support level. The price is currently above this key moving average, further confirming the bullish outlook in the short-term. If ETH/USD drops to test this moving average, it could present a buying opportunity for traders looking to enter near support. A sustained break below the SMA would warrant caution, as it may indicate a reversal or consolidation phase.

Considering the current market environment, traders should watch the resistance at $2376.47 closely. A confirmed break above this level could open the door for ETH/USD to test new highs, potentially reaching the $2400 area. On the downside, the $2343.19 low offers immediate support. A failure to hold above this level could trigger a deeper pullback, testing the next significant support zones. Traders are advised to monitor both price action and volume for confirmation of the breakout or breakdown.
